## What it does

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED: overview -->
Asymmetric writing style for Mural: outbound (writing into Mural) is sticky-concise; inbound (extracting from Mural) is context-hydrated.
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED: overview -->
